title: Ballon d'Or awards moves from Paris to London
summary: The 2026 Ballon d'Or ceremony relocates from Paris to London to commemorate the award's 70th anniversary, marking the legacy of England legend Stanley Matthews who won the inaugural award.
content: The Ballon d'Or ceremony is moving from its traditional Paris home to London for the 2026 edition to mark the 70th anniversary of the first award won by England great Stanley Matthews.
